positive: A geometric, stylized depiction of a wise owl perched on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by abstract constellations and flowing cosmic lines. The style is neo-tribal, highly symmetrical, and reminiscent of stained glass art mixed with Art Deco aesthetics. The owl has large, watchful eyes and feathers that form complex, interconnected patterns. Use a limited, rich color palette: deep indigo blue, matte gold, antique brass, and cream. The composition should be centered, featuring clean, bold silhouettes against negative space, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Perfect linework, vector quality, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photo, realistic, fuzzy
